response.original_title: Sky Gods: The Price of Our Love of Flying
response.overview: Powered flight is one of humanity’s greatest achievements. International cooperation has created a global system of safe travel benefiting billions, but modern flight may threaten the Earth itself. “Sky Gods” follows climate journalist Bernice Notenboom worldwide to explore the environmental impact of flying, engaging airlines, airports, biofuel developers, policymakers, and passengers. The film examines choices, collaboration, and solutions shaping the future of flight.
response.tagline: Exploring the true cost of our love for flying
response.title: Sky Gods: The Price of Our Love of Flying
